title: Teras
body:
Sidemod for "Pixelmon: Wingull Edition 2", a Pixelmon server opening on 2025. Many features are tied to the server, as the SmartRotom for authentication purposes. **This features won't work standalone**, but documentation will be provided on how to adapt it for your own purposes.

Teras is a feature-rich Forge 1.16.5 mod built for multiplayer servers. It adds a kart racing minigame, deep integrations with Pixelmon, an in-game web pad (SmartRotom) powered by MCEF, new world-generation features, procedural dungeons, and various server-focused utilities.

Main features:

- Kart racing system
  - Full race lifecycle: track loading, voting, race management, and vehicle handling.
- SmartRotom in-game web pad (MCEF)
  - An item that displays web content in-game using MCEF, with custom rendering for an immersive UI.
- Pixelmon integrations
  - Battle logging and hooks for improved Pixelmon server management, plus behavior tweaks for Rotom interactions and shearing where applicable.
- Procedural dungeons & commands
  - Tools and commands to generate procedural dungeons with configurable parameters.
- Custom biomes & world content
  - New biome definitions and registration utilities to extend world variety.
- Integration plugins & helpers
  - Optional plugins and scaffolding for popular mods such as JourneyMap and other integrations.
- Misc gameplay items & utilities
  - Additional items, utilities, and helper systems designed to enhance multiplayer and Pixelmon gameplay.
